fixture: 032_null_predicates

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 = NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN
    rows:
      [0] NULL

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT NULL = NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN
    rows:
      [0] NULL

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 <> NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN
    rows:
      [0] NULL

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT NULL IS NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] true

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT NULL IS NOT NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BOOLEAN NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] false
